title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 374.760 - Unsatisfied judgments, affidavit filed monthly, form — content
text:
374.760.  Unsatisfied judgments, affidavit filed monthly, form — content. — Each general bail bond agent shall file, between the first and tenth day of each month, sworn affidavits with the department stating that there are no unsatisfied judgments against him.  Such affidavits shall be in the form and manner prescribed by the department.
(L. 1983 S.B. 363 § 8)
